summary: Verified 4 bug fixes and 4 regressions on Frenny Sheth scrapbook portfolio. All 8 assertions passed via Playwright on the live preview URL.

verification_results.BUG2_about_side_door_no_circle: PASS — 0 <svg> inside About <h2>; 'side door' span is plain italic text-wine
verification_results.BUG4_arrow_repointed: PASS — annotation now contains 'flip through my work' (count=2 including button label); 'keep scrolling, gently' = 0; DoodleArrow direction='nw' rendered next to it
verification_results.REG_hero_subtitle: PASS — subtitle contains 'I ask', 'why?', and 'useful UX skill'
verification_results.REG_masthead: PASS — 'Currently designing' present with .animate-ping pulsing dot; 'Winter, 2026' not present
verification_results.REG_stamps_in_other_sections: PASS — Process has stamp 'Iterate · Always' (count=1); Contact has stamp 'Sealed · with love' (count=1)
verification_results.REG_polaroids_elsewhere_have_tape: PASS — About .tape count=2 (polaroid + sticky note tape); Hobbies .tape count=4

critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx still imports DoodleCircle and Stamp from Doodles even though they are no longer used in this file — consider removing unused imports to keep the file tidy.
About.jsx still imports DoodleCircle though it is no longer used after the circle removal — drop the unused import.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug-fix iteration_2 fully verified. Iteration_1 covered contact links, photos collage and hobbies. Only minor lint cleanup (unused DoodleCircle/Stamp imports in Hero.jsx and About.jsx) remains; no functional issues.
